proposed_field_values.proposed_value: Christine E. Young, an 81-year-old female, is being admitted to home health care following her discharge from Fountain Hills Post Acute after a prolonged hospitalization due to multifocal pneumonia, acute respiratory failure with hypoxia, and acute on chronic congestive heart failure, among other chronic conditions. Has conditions such as chronic atrial fibrillation, acute kidney failure, metabolic encephalopathy, and dysphagia, which have compounded her health status and functional limitations.
source_spans: Christine E.
proposed_field_values.rationale: Medical necessity was summarized from referral narrative and skilled-need evidence.

proposed_field_values.proposed_value: Christine Young is an 81-year-old female referred for home health services on February 23, 2026, with a start of care date of February 27, 2026, under the supervision of Dr. Vinay Prabhakaran. She was recently discharged from a skilled nursing facility on February 20, 2026. A physical therapy assessment was completed, noting that she is homebound due to significant weakness, pain, impaired mobility, poor balance, and an unsteady gait.
